config.description: Wrap theme switcher form in nav landmark

testCases.expectedFix: Page content should be contained by landmarks

patchApplicability.error:
Command failed: git apply --check "/Users/mike.gifford/drupal-core/patches/a11y-DRUPAL-A11Y-006-theme-switcher-landmark.patch"
error: corrupt patch at /Users/mike.gifford/drupal-core/patches/a11y-DRUPAL-A11Y-006-theme-switcher-landmark.patch:15

commands: ddev drush cset system.theme default olivero -y
ddev drush cset system.theme admin claro -y

runContext.note: Evaluator applies deterministic theme setup and explicit runtime condition overrides for each test.

html.html:
Welcome!

You haven’t created any frontpage content yet.

Congratulations and welcome to the Drupal community.

Drupal is an open source platform for building amazing digital experiences. It’s made, used, taught, documented, and marketed by the Drupal community. Our community is made up of people from around the world with a shared set of values, collaborating together in a respectful manner. As we like to say:

Come for the code, stay for the community.

Get Started

There are a few ways to get started with Drupal:

  1. User Guide: Includes installing, administering, site building, and maintaining the content of a Drupal website.
  2. Create Content: Want to get right to work? Start adding content. Note: the information on this page will go away once you add content to your site. Read on and bookmark resources of interest.
  3. Extend Drupal: Drupal’s core software can be extended and customized in remarkable ways. Install additional functionality and change the look of your site using addons contributed by our community.

Next Steps

Bookmark these links to our active Drupal community groups and support resources.

  • Upcoming Events: Learn and connect with others at conferences and events held around the world.
  • Community Page: List of key Drupal community groups with their own content.
  • Get support and chat with the Drupal community on Slack or DrupalChat. When you’re looking for a solution to a problem, go to Drupal Support or Drupal Answers on Stack Exchange.

Main navigation

  • Home
User account menu
  • Log in

violations.description: Ensure links are distinguished from surrounding text in a way that does not rely on color
violations.help: Links must be distinguishable without relying on color

any.message: The link has insufficient color contrast of 2.49:1 with the surrounding text. (Minimum contrast is 3:1, link text: #1475ad, surrounding text: #2b353b)
The link has no styling (such as underline) to distinguish it from the surrounding text

nodes.failureSummary:

setupSteps: ddev drush cset system.theme default olivero -y
ddev drush cset system.theme admin claro -y
testFlow: Navigate to each test case URL under requested conditions and capture baseline evidence.
Clear Drupal cache with: ddev drush cache-rebuild
Revisit same URL + conditions and capture post-patch evidence.
replication.expectedProof: Problem must be observed before patch and not observed after patch under the same recorded conditions.
